category_sources: source_facts.description says terminal file manager; official lf README describes lf as a terminal file manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lf; official GitHub README uses LF/lf and explains it as list files.
docs_sources: Official README points users to bundled documentation via lf -doc and online docs at pkg.go.dev; doc.md is in the official repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/gokcehan/lf, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official README describes terminal file manager features and Go implementation.
